description:
Remove the _kp debugging stub at the bottom of ir_codegen.rs:

  fn _kp(_: &Var) {}

It is marked #[allow(dead_code)] and serves no purpose. Delete it.

This is a prerequisite for fz-cg1.2 (removing the blanket module allow), which
will fire on this function without the per-fn suppress.

## LANDING THE WORK
  Land this ticket before starting the next one:
  - Commit only the changes for this ticket, referencing fz-cg1.1
  - Close the ticket (`bw close fz-v9l.1`); It will tell you if work is newly unblocked
title: fz-cg1.1 remove _kp dead function
